title: Change plans politely
subtitle: Explain a change without sounding rude.
overview: Explain a change without sounding rude.
A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I am sorry, but I need to change our plan.
不好意思，但我需要改一下我们的计划。
Something came up, so can we meet later?
临时有事，所以我们可以晚点见吗？
Can we still meet at two?
I am sorry, but can we meet later?
不好意思，我们可以晚点见吗？

items.en: I am sorry, but I need to change our plan.
items.zh: 不好意思，但我需要改一下我们的计划。

items.en: Something came up, so can we meet later?
items.zh: 临时有事，所以我们可以晚点见吗？

items.en: Can we still meet at two?
I am sorry, but can we meet later?
items.zh: 不好意思，我们可以晚点见吗？

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can we still meet at two?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I am sorry, but can we meet later?
lines.zh: 不好意思，我们可以晚点见吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Something came up, so can we meet later?
lines.zh: 临时有事，所以我们可以晚点见吗？

items.en: I am sorry, but I need to change our plan.
items.zh: 不好意思，但我需要改一下我们的计划。

items.en: Something came up, so can we meet later?
items.zh: 临时有事，所以我们可以晚点见吗？

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
